name: Individual Thai Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bread shells, cups sides up, on 2 baking sheets, each measuring 12x15 inches. Spread the sauce evenly over the cups in the bread. Scatter bean sprouts equally on the crusts, then sprinkle with cheese.
2. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F until the cheese has melted and begun to brown, for 12-15 minutes (if using one oven, switch pan positions after 7 minutes). Place pizzas on dinner plates; top evenly with shrimp and onion. Add chilies to taste. Eat with a knife and fork, or cut into wedges to pick up and eat.
THAI PEANUT SAUCE
Combine water, soy sauce, cider vinegar, and sugar in a bowl. Mix in this mixture with the peanut butter, seasoned rice vinegar, and sesame oil.
